goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, f), x0, square_real(x0) * d + f(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, square_real), x0, f(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * d)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, f), x0, cube_real(x0) * d + f(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, cube_real), x0, f(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + cube_real(x0) * d)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](quartic_real, f), x0, quartic_real(x0) * d + f(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, quartic_real), x0, f(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * d)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, cube_real), x0, square_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + cube_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, quartic_real), x0, square_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, quartic_real), x0, cube_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, square_real), x0, square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
proof: not has_derivative_at(square_real, x0, x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, cube_real), x0, cube_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + cube_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
proof: not has_derivative_at(cube_real, x0, square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](quartic_real, quartic_real), x0, quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
proof: not has_derivative_at(quartic_real, x0, square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, cube_real), quartic_real), x0, pointwise_mul(square_real, cube_real, x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + cube_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))
proof: not has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, cube_real), x0, square_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + cube_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, quartic_real)), x0, square_real(x0) * (cube_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))) + pointwise_mul(cube_real, quartic_real, x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
proof: not has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, quartic_real), x0, cube_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1) + square_real(x0) * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)) + quartic_real(x0) * (square_real(x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)))

goal: differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, cube_real), quartic_real), x0)
proof: not differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, cube_real), x0) or not differentiable_at(quartic_real, x0)

goal: differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](square_real, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, quartic_real)), x0)
proof: not differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](cube_real, quartic_real), x0) or not differentiable_at(square_real, x0)
